products.title: Down Alternative Pillow
products.description: Get all the plumpness and fluff of a down pillow...without the down. This one is stuffed with near-magical hypoallergenic fill that will help you rack up all the hours of sleep you ever dreamed of.

products.title: Down Pillow
products.description: Dive head first into better sleep than you ever thought possible with premium white down inside the softest sateen shell. The super-high fill power makes tossing and turning a thing of the past.

products.title: Classic Bath Mat
products.description: Step out of the shower or tub onto a bath mat that is so plush, absorbent and super soft - you'll find yourself standing around naked a little bit longer. Our luxury bath mat is available in white, ivory, grey, slate and charcoal.

products.title: Percale Pillow Sham
products.description: With an envelope closure in the back, our Pillow Shams are made with 100% long-staple cotton to create a crisp percale fabric that looks as lovely as it feels. Shams sold in set of two.

products.description: We’ve partnered with Let’s Cuddle to bring you an expertly-crafted weighted blanket that combines exceptional comfort with refined design. Offering an ultra-comforting 15 lbs of weight, our new blanket is engineered to help you relax and unwind—whether after a long day or whenever you need it. Hyper-soft Sateen or crisp Percale.

products.description: You need to put a stake in the ground on some things. One of those things should be the presence of a strong, sharp, well-balanced steak knife for a steak dinner or the perfect lamb chop. With all that functionality and these good looks, our set more than makes the cut.

products.title: Oxidized Walnut Cheese Board
products.description: This American-made, hand-finished walnut Cheese Board will serve as the most unique piece on your dinner or coffee table. Or even nightstand. Because while it's technically "for" cheese, it makes for a beautiful background for cookies and a glass of milk as well.

products.title: Cone Candle
products.description: These modern decorative candles transform any table into a tableau. Available in two sizes, for limitless combination options—lining a mantle, creating a centerpiece or, letting one star on its own. Select from an array of shades to offer a hint of holiday in a tone more minimalist than merry.

products.title: Bar Spoon

products.description: Handcrafted in the USA from sustainable Black Walnut, this end-grain cutting board is the perfect size and weight for easy cleaning, and doubles as a countertop butcher’s block. Flip it over and you’ve got a chic serving board. Did we mention it’s end-grain and heals itself? Let’s face it, your old cutting boards are chopped liver.

products.description: Who says a matching set has to be so ... matching? We pair our towels by color, and let the differing print set them apart for a hint of pattern-play in your kitchen.

products.description: Meet your scorch mark’s savior, the all-natural walnut trivet. Sizzling cast irons and casseroles can rest safely, because it’s the strong protective type. Secure when you need it to save your table, purely a treat to look at when you don’t.

products.title: Kitchen Towel Set
products.description: Timeless stripes add a playful and pretty darn useful touch to your kitchen. Our Italian washed linen kitchen towels come in the perfect range of neutrals. Chic, soft and extra durable, they can stand up to any culinary challenges (or incident created by such).

products.title: Rectangular Platter
products.description: Canapes or crudite, this Rectangular Platter perfectly frames whatever you're serving. It fits in nicely at a crowded dinner table.

products.description: Thoughtfully sized to double as a hair towel, our Classic Hand Towel is more than meets the eye. Whether hanging on a towel rack or twisted up as a post-shower topper, it's a Snowe favorite.

products.description: Made from the best down around, our comforter adds a luxurious layer to any bed. Whether you hit snooze too many times or drag it to the couch to binge-watch, its cocooning comfort is addictive.

products.title: Walnut Cheese Board
products.description: This American-made, hand-finished walnut Cheese Board will serve as the most unique piece on your dinner or coffee table. Or even nightstand. Because while it's technically "for" cheese, it makes for a beautiful background for cookies and a glass of milk as well.

products.title: Softexture Blanket
products.description: A blanket is that perfect top layer for those hot summer nights, or to add a layer of texture or color with your percale or sateen duvet. Our Softexture uses a unique wash that transforms 100% long-staple cotton into a textured, soft layer that looks just as good laid out straight across the bed, folded at the foot, or honestly, crumpled in the center.

products.title: Honeycomb Bathrobe
products.description: We improved upon the classic waffle (not the syrup one, the weave) for a fast-drying, lightweight riff that's effortlessly chic. Our revolutionary soft construction offers a bit of give, so you feel swaddled and up for anything post-shower. It's Oeko-tex certified, so you can lounge with a clear conscience.

products.title: Edge Stripe Throw
products.description: Modern and classic, this oh-so-cozy throw is your good-for-all-occasions best friend. Versatile (available in three different colorways), lightweight but cozy enough for true comfort, and just a little edgy—a subtle eyelash fringe and contrasting edge stripe give it glamour when folded. Bring this throw anywhere and anyone not enveloped will be jealous.

products.title: Checked Throw
products.description: Awe-inspiring Merino lambswool? Check. A playful, chic fringed edge? Check. A classic yet on-trend pattern in three perfect shades? Checked. Literally. Crafted in Italy to be both breathable and moisture-wicking, it’s extra light but extra warm so you can throw it on like a scarf, too.

products.title: Italian Quilt - Ivory (Selling Out Soon)
products.description: Our 100% cotton, Italian-crafted beauty is versatile enough to lend a welcome weight on top of your comforter in the winter months, or stand alone as your one-and-only bed topper. Packed with premium fill that stays in place thanks to the stitched pattern – which yes, adds stylish texture to the perfect bedscape.

products.title: Honeycomb Spa Set
products.description: For a fraction of the cost of a trip to Canyon Ranch, you can truly treat yourself. Our Spa Set, with a luxurious bathrobe and a Rinse & Repeat candle, will send you on the path to serenity.

products.title: Marble Candle Holders - Sand
products.description: Whether or not you gave up cooking after the third attempt to order takeout, count on the Marble Candle Holders to lift the mood. The perfect balance of sturdy and sweet to help you feel relaxed, romantic, or safe during a blackout. Set of 2.

products.title: Marble Cheese Board - Sand (Selling Out Soon)
products.description: The highlight of any event comes early when it arrives on the Marble Cheese Board. In four striking shades, any appetizer from a chunk of cheddar to a bite of bruschetta steals the show. Good luck saving room for dinner.

products.title: Marble Accent Bowl
products.description: Make it extra spicy. Or don’t. However you prefer to dip or sprinkle a little extra flavor the Marble Accent Bowl makes sure you look good doing it. On the side, front and center, single, or grouped, it’s your most versatile piece of flair.

products.title: Marble Wine Cooler (Selling Out Soon)
products.description: Keep your vino chilled (and less likely to be spilled) by setting it in stone. Marble’s natural properties help chill your wine, and add a stately air to your table. Pro-tip: pre-chill in the freezer to keep your bottle extra cool.

products.title: Resin Serving Spoon Set - Onyx (Final Sale)
products.description: Serve up a look no matter what you're serving. Handswirled and handcrafted, each spoon of this resin set is one-of-a-kind. Use them together for serving salad or split them up in individual dishes for an extra dose of drama. Available in 4 hypnotic hues—Luna, Sand, Onyx, and Ocean.

products.title: Resin Oval Serving Bowl (Selling Out Soon)
products.description: Handswirled and handpolished, each mesmerizing resin serving bowl is one-of-a-kind. Masterful (and magically lightweight), this bowl makes a stunning statement serving leafy greens at the dinner table or catching keys on the console. Available in 4 hypnotic hues—Luna, Sand, Onyx, and Ocean.

products.title: Resin Low Serving Bowl
products.description: Masterful (and magically lightweight), this low serving bowl is worth planning your entire menu around. Thanks to its handswirled and handcrafted nature, each piece is one-of-a-kind. With its low profile, the bowl leaves enough of a sightline across the table—if you can take your eyes off its swirling majesty, that is. Available in 4 hypnotic hues—Luna, Sand, Onyx, and Ocean.

products.title: Resin Large Nesting Tray (Selling Out Soon)
products.description: Masterfully handswirled and handmade, this large resin rectangular nesting tray is as at home dressing up your appetizers as it is on your dresser. Use it as a catchall, to serve apps, or to display your jewelry. We love nesting it with its smaller counterpart for maximum drama. Available in 4 hypnotic hues—Luna, Sand, Onyx, and Ocean.

products.title: Marble Bud Vase - Sand (Selling Out Soon)
products.description: A bud vase with big presence. Our cylindrical vase features a small notch as a nod to the geometric forms of our full collection. Sturdy and substantial, it lends gravitas to even a single stem. We love how it stands alone sans stem as an objet d'art.

products.title: Taper Candles Set
products.description: Towering, artisan tapers add an element of drama to your table—without adding much effort on your part. Ours are artisan-made in Mexico and come in a range of hues ideal for mixing and matching. It's a bright idea with moody effects.

products.title: Cashmere Stripe Throw
products.description: Italian-made, this cashmere throw will make a statement wherever it goes. The broken stripe pattern is so striking, we won't blame you for throwing it on as a shawl—thankfully its lightweight silhouette and natural breathability make it luxuriously warm (or cool) enough to be the always-right-layer.

products.title: Eco Cashmere Throw
products.description: We've engineered a new way to enjoy the luxe life. Crafted from 95% recycled cashmere, your conscience can feel as good as your cuddles. With a delicate fringe detailing, it's a Mother Earth-approved indulgence you don't need to resist.

products.title: Marble Mini Bowl
products.description: Sprinkle in a few stone-cold accents to up the ante on any spread. Our tiny bowls make a big impact when filled with nuts, salt, or spices. Stash one on your side table, your bar, or your bedside for catching bits, bobs, and jewelry.

products.title: Marble Coasters
products.description: Put ‘er there. Or over there. Treat every sip to a throne of handcrafted Marble, from your piping hot morning cup to the crisp cap on your evening. Then repeat. Set of 4.

products.title: Sateen Pillow Cases
products.description: Wake up on a cloud – an ultra-smooth, luxuriously-soft cotton cloud that is. The smoothness may even convert you to sleeping face-down. Set of 2.

products.title: Sateen Duvet Cover
products.description: Certain colors will ship with in 2-3 weeks. Our unique sateen weave of 100% long-staple cotton translates to a super soft and breathable feel. Touched with a lightly luminous sheen, it layers a bit of interest to your bedscape. And always subtlety functional with a concealed rubber button closure.

products.title: Cocktail Shaker
products.description: The best cocktail shaker makes you the best behind the bar. Gleaming stainless steel meets classic contours for a timeless form to mix and strain your signature drinks. Finished with an air-tight shaker top, so your shimmy-shake move won’t spill a drop.

products.title: Signature Tote Bag
products.description: Totes the next best thing to home, on the go. Our cult-favorite Snowe totes are now available for purchase for the first time ever, in signature 100% cotton, goes-with-everything black and white. Consider it the ultimate statement piece.

products.title: Table Knife (each)
products.description: Our classic flatware has won rave reviews from table-setting connoisseurs as well as folks who’ve “never felt this way about flatware.” We get it: Utensils tend not to make your heart beat faster. But why shouldn’t they? Here's to a lifetime of sticking a fork in it. Single table knife.

products.title: Spoon (each)
products.description: Our classic flatware has won rave reviews from table-setting connoisseurs as well as folks who’ve “never felt this way about flatware.” We get it: Utensils tend not to make your heart beat faster. But why shouldn’t they? Here's to a lifetime of sticking a fork in it. Single spoon.

products.title: Softexture Pillow Sham
products.description: Our lushly textured Softexture shams propped up on your bed look magazine spread-worthy. But you, propped up against these while reading a magazine? Bliss. The soft, washed 100% long-staple cotton is the result of double-cloth construction with a jacquard woven finish. Looks as good as it feels; feels even better when pajama-free. Shams sold individually.

products.title: Italian Softexture Duvet Cover - Full/Queen (Selling Out Soon)
products.description: Our Softexture bedding uses a unique wash to transform 100% long-staple cotton into a textured, breezily rumpled beauty that feels baby-soft. Combine with crisp percale, supple sateen, or breezy linen sheets for an effortless luxe look that's ‘oh so’ inviting. Internal ties and rubber buttons mean you're safe from comforter bunching or peek-a-boo.

products.title: Chef's Towel - Classic Stripe
products.description: A French twist on one of our best-sellers: The chef's towel/apron (who doesn't love a two-fer?) is now available in low-key, fashion-forward stripes.

products.title: Digital Gift Card
products.description: Help them change the way they think about basics with a gift card that is anything but. Ranging from $25 to $500, it's a subtle reminder to help others elevate their everyday at home. You'll receive the gift card via email immediately after purchase. When you're ready to gift, you can forward it to your special recipient. The gift card contains a code to redeem at checkout. Non-refundable

products.title: Classic Bath Sheet
products.description: Towels are not a one-size-fits-all solution. That's why our luxury bath sheet is generously sized, super soft, and made from our signature air spun cotton. The best quality with just a little more coverage.

products.title: Classic Washcloth
products.description: Using a technology that spins each cotton fiber with air, we've made a towel that is lightweight, absorbent, and quick drying. Wash up in celebration. Finally, your washcloth no longer feels like a sponge.

products.title: Percale Duvet Cover
products.description: Set the stage for your sleep with a smooth showstopper. Our duvet cover offers a crisp matte look and a 500 thread count. With each detail in mind, it is finished with a subtle line of embroidery, and a hidden button closure.

products.title: Percale Pillow Cases
products.description: Insomniac or consummate lazy bones, everyone needs a smooth, soft place to lay their face. Our subtly embroidered percale pillow cases works for anyone. Set of 2.

products.title: Ladle
products.description: Our Ladle is the extra detail that makes the meal go down smooth. Go ahead, pass the sauce.

products.title: Cake Server (Selling Out Soon)
products.description: Cutting the cake is great, but the real magic is in the serving. Reach for this classic stainless steel server right after all the candles are blown out.
